Deletes the history of all disk transactions done so far

DiskMark - Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm
ֿReturns the progress of the DiskWorker in various formats.
DiskMark.MarkType - Enum Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm
 
DiskRun - Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist
Stores information about the results of a single disk write/read test
DiskRun() - Constructor for class edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist.DiskRun
 
DiskRun(DiskRun.IOMode, DiskRun.BlockSequence) - Constructor for class edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist.DiskRun
 
DiskRun.BlockSequence - Enum Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist
 
DiskRun.IOMode - Enum Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist
 
DiskWorker - Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm
Execute disk benchmarking as a Swing-compliant thread (only one of these threads can run at once.) Cooperates with Swing to provide and make use of interim and final progress and information, which is also recorded as needed to the persistence store, and log.
DiskWorker() - Constructor for class edu.touro.mco152.bm.DiskWorker
 
displayString(double) - Static method in class edu.touro.mco152.bm.Util
 
doInBackground() - Method in class edu.touro.mco152.bm.DiskWorker
 
done() - Method in class edu.touro.mco152.bm.DiskWorker

A container for classes dealing with the user interface.
